description.selection: Use this template for single-page React web applications: dashboards, interactive tools, forms, landing pages, and client-side UIs. It has no server-side rendering and no backend router, so pick it when the app is primarily a rich frontend that can call external APIs directly from the browser.
description.usage: React 18 + Vite + TypeScript single-page app. The dev server runs on port 8080. Build the UI in src/App.tsx and add components/hooks under src/. Global styles live in src/index.css. There is no backend in this template; call third-party APIs from the client, or add a lightweight one later. Do not edit vite.config.ts or tsconfig.json.
